entities.name: CALIBRATION SUBSETTING
entities.description: Strategies used to produce subsets of data for model calibration based on property, spectra, or both variation.

entities.name: CHEMOMETRICS
entities.description: Chemical analysis using mathematical and statistical methods to predict soil properties.

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where smallholder agricultural villages were studied.

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of soil functioning as a vital living ecosystem, supported by chemometric modelling.

entities.name: SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical and chemical characteristics of soil, including texture, carbon, and nutrients.

entities.name: VISIBLE NEAR-INFRARED SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A technique used to predict soil properties based on spectral data.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The field of study from which parametric models like SPLSR and HEM were transferred.

entities.name: SOIL SCIENCE
entities.description: The study of soil as a natural resource.

entities.name: PARTIAL LEAST SQUARES REGRESSION
entities.description: A standard regression method used for soil property modelling.

entities.name: SPARSE PARTIAL LEAST SQUARES REGRESSION
entities.description: A variable-reduction modelling method transferred from genomics to soil science.

entities.name: HETEROSCEDASTIC EFFECTS MODEL
entities.description: A variable-reduction modelling method transferred from genomics to soil science.

entities.name: SOIL TEXTURE
entities.description: A physical property of soil predicted using spectral methods.

entities.name: SOIL CARBON
entities.description: A chemical property of soil predicted using spectral methods.

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Available macro- and micro-nutrients in the soil.

entities.name: SPECTRAL VARIATION
entities.description: The degree of variation in the spectra of soil samples.

entities.name: ATTRIBUTE VARIATION
entities.description: The degree of variation in the soil properties/attributes.
